textByHashes.28281cc981875acd5ec2f3c3cb667eac444feac8: I am researching the Dark Altar. Many of our forefathers spent their lives studying it, though much knowledge was lost over the generations.
textByHashes.067ad6efd74ca823fe8851bdf5af890d40b87090: I believe some of their writings would have been stored in this Library, though the Librarian seems unable to help me locate any.
textByHashes.620a2d0550949781d1616fa8b1d790197e1bc55f: Excuse me, I do not believe we have any business.
textByHashes.70fddd699378e8c038a66014cced3b8f8cb5e80b: I wonder, traveller... Could you assist me?
textByHashes.7e6067fe8397bf85325f3e0c25f2c9c8b67887b9: I believe many of their writings would have been stored in this Library, though the Librarian seems unable to help me locate any.
textByHashes.8e382b4cafdfbd8a601ec0223fb31ecee6b35009: In your exploration of the Library, if you should happen to find any manuscripts of this nature, please bring them to me, and you will gain my gratitude.
textByHashes.933d82c8dfab78a20a19828f9f43d901abf9ae88: Do you have any dark manuscripts for me, traveller?
textByHashes.94976133b91bb1ca1c13ae92251410e78e24242c: Our forefathers studied the Dark Altar for generations. I am sure their knowledge is stored in this Library somewhere. It is a shame that the Librarian seems unable to help me.
textByHashes.f2715bb27f0cd0893271e80972e0aac45e217e26: Thank you very much. In return, I have given you some knowledge that you may perhaps appreciate.
